articles.title: Rockets Fight to Stay Alive Against LeBron and the Lakers
articles.original_title: NBA Playoffs Scores, Live Updates: Alperen Şengün, Rockets Trying to Stave Off Elimination vs. LeBron, Lakers - Sports Illustrated
articles.summary: In Game 4 of the first‑round playoff series, the Houston Rockets, led by Alperen Şengün, attempted to stave off elimination by the Los Angeles Lakers. LeBron James and the Lakers maintained control, pushing the Rockets toward a potential series loss.
key_points: Alperen Şengün led the Rockets' offensive effort in a must‑win game.
LeBron James contributed significantly on both ends, helping the Lakers keep the series advantage.
The Rockets faced elimination, needing a win to extend the series to a decisive Game 5.

key_points: The Lakers confirmed multiple injuries, affecting rotation options for Game 4.
Key players listed included those with oblique strains and ankle issues.
Coaching staff faced adjustments to manage limited availability.

articles.title: Austin Reaves and Kevin Durant Out for Lakers Game 4 vs. Rockets
articles.original_title: Lakers Vs. Rockets Report: Austin Reaves And Kevin Durant Out For Game 4
articles.summary: Lakers Nation detailed the updated injury report confirming that guard Austin Reaves (left oblique strain) and forward Kevin Durant (bone bruise on a sprained left ankle) would miss Game 4 against Houston. Their absences further strained the Lakers' bench depth.
key_points: Austin Reaves ruled out due to a left oblique muscle strain.
Kevin Durant sidelined because of a bone bruise on his left ankle.
The injuries left the Lakers with reduced scoring options for the decisive game.

articles.title: JJ Redick Says LeBron James Had the Lowest Body Fat Percentage of His Career

articles.summary: Former NBA sharpshooter JJ Redick revealed that LeBron James recently recorded the lowest body‑fat percentage he has ever seen for the seven‑time All‑Star. Redick discussed the metrics during a recent interview, noting the impact on James' conditioning and on‑court performance.
key_points: LeBron's body‑fat percentage is at a career low, according to Redick.
Redick linked the metric to James' improved stamina and mobility.
The comment came while discussing the Lakers' preparation for the upcoming schedule.

articles.summary: Heavy.com compiled the latest information on Luka Dončić’s recovery after sustaining a left‑ankle sprain. Medical staff estimate a return window of 7‑10 days, with the Mavericks monitoring his progress closely before clearing him for game action.
key_points: Dončić suffered a left‑ankle sprain during practice.
Team doctors project a 7‑10 day recovery period.
Mavericks will run functional tests before giving him clearance.

articles.original_title: LeBron James glued to TV watching American star win third major of career - The Mirror US
articles.summary: LeBron James was spotted watching television as an American athlete captured his third major championship in a different sport. James commented that he enjoys seeing fellow competitors succeed, but did not elaborate further.
key_points: LeBron was seen viewing the event on TV.
The athlete secured a third major title in his sport.
James expressed admiration for the achievement.

articles.title: JJ Redick Gives Insight on Luka Dončić’s Comeback Timeline
articles.original_title: Luka Doncic injury update: JJ Redick offers insight into Lakers star’s comeback - The Times of India
articles.summary: In an interview with The Times of India, former player and analyst JJ Redick provided his perspective on Luka Dončić’s injury status and projected return date. Redick highlighted the importance of gradual load management and said Dončić should be ready for the next stretch of games.
key_points: Redick believes Dončić’s ankle will heal within two weeks.
He emphasized a cautious approach to avoid re‑injury.
Dončić is expected to rejoin the lineup for the upcoming series.

articles.summary: Heavy.com reported that the Mavericks received encouraging updates on Luka Dončić’s health before their fourth matchup with the Houston Rockets. The team confirmed that his symptoms have improved and that he remains on track for a return later in the week.
key_points: Dončić’s ankle soreness has decreased significantly.
Coaches are optimistic about his availability for Game 5.
The Mavericks plan to integrate him gradually once cleared.

articles.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers announced that guard Austin Reaves will miss Game 4 against the Houston Rockets due to a lingering injury. Reaves has been a key contributor this postseason, and his absence forces the Lakers to adjust their rotation.
key_points: Reaves ruled out for Game 4 because of a reported injury.
Lakers will need to reshuffle guard minutes and rely on depth.
The decision comes ahead of a crucial elimination matchup.

key_points: LeBron James and Anthony Davis remain in the starting lineup.
A new guard combination is set to replace Reaves.
Coach Darvin Ham aims to maintain defensive intensity despite the roster change.

articles.summary: Reports indicate that Kevin Durant will be unavailable for the Rockets' Game 4, leaving Houston without one of its primary scorers as they face elimination against the Lakers. The Lakers, led by LeBron James, will have a significant advantage without Durant on the floor.
key_points: Durant expected to sit out Game 4 due to injury/illness.
Rockets lose a major offensive option heading into an elimination game.
Lakers gain a strategic edge with both Reaves and Durant out.
